name: Hamakua
description_short: Hamakua Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Hawaii communities with competitive loan rates, deposit accounts, and financial services exclusively for members.
description_long:
Hamakua Federal Credit Union (Hamakua FCU) is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union operating in Hawaii with routing number 321380001. The credit union serves island communities across Hawaii and operates as a not-for-profit financial institution regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). Their membership model requires starting with a Regular Share Account to establish eligibility for additional products and services.

Hamakua FCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (Regular Share Accounts with multiple options), consumer loans (new auto loans starting at 4.25%, personal loans starting at 5.50%, credit cards), and member services. They position themselves around flexible lending, emphasizing that they "lend differently" for major purchases like vehicles and leisure expenses. The credit union provides online banking access, loan applications and payments, document upload capabilities, and a full range of transaction services.

The credit union distinguishes itself through several member-exclusive benefits and partnerships. Members can conduct transactions at any HFS Federal Credit Union branch nationwide through a reciprocal agreement. They offer surcharge-free ATM access through American Savings Bank ATMs. Additional value-adds include free notary services for members, check reordering through a partnered service, wire transfer capabilities via Fedwire, stop payment services, and partnerships with Get Away Today (Disney vacation discounts) and Hawaii Petroleum's Hawaii Fueling Network. These partnerships and services reflect an effort to provide comprehensive financial solutions beyond basic banking.

Hamakua FCU is a legitimate member-owned credit union suitable for Hawaii residents seeking competitive rates on consumer loans and convenient local service. However, as a smaller regional credit union, members should verify service availability at their specific location and compare rates against larger national credit unions. The 4.25% new auto rate and 5.50% personal loan rate appear competitive but should be evaluated against current market offerings. The geographic limitation to Hawaii and member-only access model means this institution is not suitable for non-Hawaii residents or those seeking accounts open to the general public.
services: Regular Share Accounts (membership requirement for credit union access)
Wire transfers via Fedwire (incoming and outgoing with published fee schedule)
Stop payment services on checks, ACH, and EFT transactions
Surcharge-free ATM withdrawals at American Savings Bank locations
eZCardInfo credit card management portal with 24/7 access
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.25% APR for new vehicles
Personal loans available starting at 5.50% APR
Surcharge-free ATM access through American Savings Bank network
Transaction access at any HFS Federal Credit Union branch nationwide via reciprocal agreement
Free eZCardInfo platform for 24/7 credit card account management and payment setup
Partnerships with Get Away Today for Disney vacation discounts and Hawaii Fueling Network for fuel cardlock access
cons: Geographically limited to Hawaii - not accessible to out-of-state residents
Credit card rates require phone call to determine (not published on website)
Smaller regional institution with potentially limited branch network compared to national credit unions
Member-only access model requires establishing share account before accessing other services
Limited transparency on account fees, minimum deposits, and other key terms on available pages
best_for: Hawaii residents seeking competitive consumer auto and personal loan rates
Members prioritizing access to surcharge-free ATMs and nationwide transaction services through HFS network
Individuals wanting member-exclusive benefits and partnerships (Disney discounts, fuel network access)
Local Hawaii consumers seeking personalized, community-focused financial services
diagnosis: Hamakua FCU is ideal for Hawaii residents seeking a member-owned credit union with competitive loan rates and convenient local service, though the geographic limitation and member-only access model restrict availability to those living or working in Hawaii. Prospective members should compare published rates against national alternatives and clarify all fees and account minimums before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Hamakua — Credit Union in Pepeekeo, HI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Hamakua — NCUA-insured credit union in Pepeekeo, HI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
